name: Staff Pick
description: A curated staff recommendation of a book sold at Weaver & Book.
fields_json: [{"id": "title", "name": "Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "author", "name": "Author", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "publisher", "name": "Publisher", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "language", "name": "Language", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "coverImage", "name": "Cover Image", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}, {"id": "excerpt", "name": "Excerpt", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "pickDate", "name": "Pick Date", "type": "Date", "required": false}, {"id": "pickedBy", "name": "Picked By", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}]

name: Event
description: An in-store or affiliated event hosted by Weaver & Book.
fields_json: [{"id": "title", "name": "Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "eventDate", "name": "Event Date", "type": "Date", "required": false}, {"id": "location", "name": "Location", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "description", "name": "Description", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "posterImage", "name": "Poster Image", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}, {"id": "ticketed", "name": "Ticketed", "type": "Boolean", "required": false}]

name: Author Note

fields_json: [{"id": "authorName", "name": "Author Name", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "nationality", "name": "Nationality", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "bio", "name": "Bio", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "featuredBook", "name": "Featured Book", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "translatedInto", "name": "Translated Into", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}]

name: Blog Post
description: A reading-notes or shop-news article for the weaverandbook.se journal.
fields_json: [{"id": "title", "name": "Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "slug", "name": "Slug", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "body", "name": "Body", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "author", "name": "Author", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "publishDate", "name": "Publish Date", "type": "Date", "required": false}, {"id": "heroImage", "name": "Hero Image", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}]

name: Book Category
description: A shelf category used to organise the Weaver & Book catalogue.

name: Team Member

fields_json: [{"id": "name", "name": "Name", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "role", "name": "Role", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "bio", "name": "Bio", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "portrait", "name": "Portrait", "type": "Link", "linkType": "Asset", "required": false}]

fields_json: [{"id": "label", "name": "Label", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "day", "name": "Day", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "openTime", "name": "Open Time", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "closeTime", "name": "Close Time", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "closed", "name": "Closed", "type": "Boolean", "required": false}]

fields_json: [{"id": "headline", "name": "Headline", "type": "Symbol", "required": true}, {"id": "reviewer", "name": "Reviewer", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}, {"id": "rating", "name": "Rating", "type": "Integer", "required": false}, {"id": "body", "name": "Body", "type": "Text", "required": false}, {"id": "bookTitle", "name": "Book Title", "type": "Symbol", "required": false}]
